subcodes.first_line: O ye who are sorely tried in the path of the Almighty! That which befalleth the human frame in the path of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آزردگان سبیل حضرت یزدان آنچه در راه خدا بر سر اید هیکل وجود انسانرا
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @thankfulness; gratitude, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
